summary.en: EU public AC charging points must use IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) connectors. Mandated for all new public charging infrastructure under AFIR (Regulation (EU) 2023/1804).
summary.zh: 欧盟公共交流充电桩须采用IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）接口。根据AFIR法规（欧盟法规2023/1804），所有新建公共充电基础设施均须符合此要求。
summary.zht: 歐盟公共交流充電樁須採用IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）接口。根據AFIR法規（歐盟法規2023/1804），所有新建公共充電基礎設施均須符合此要求。

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.2 for AC charging, which defines a physically distinct 7-pin connector incompatible with IEC Type 2. GB/T plugs cannot mate with EU Type 2 sockets.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电采用GB/T 20234.2标准，定义了与IEC Type 2物理上不兼容的7针接口。GB/T插头无法与欧盟Type 2插座配合使用。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電採用GB/T 20234.2標準，定義了與IEC Type 2物理上不相容的7針接口。GB/T插頭無法與歐盟Type 2插座配合使用。

gap.en: Hardware connector is physically incompatible. A Chinese EV with a GB/T AC inlet cannot charge at EU public Type 2 AC stations without a physical inlet/socket change. The connector body, pin count, and locking mechanism all differ. No adapter is legally permitted for public infrastructure use under AFIR.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容。搭载GB/T交流接口的中国电动汽车，无法在欧盟Type 2公共交流充电站充电，必须更换物理接口。接口外形、针脚数量及锁定机构均不相同。根据AFIR，公共基础设施不允许使用转接头。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容。搭載GB/T交流接口的中國電動汽車，無法在歐盟Type 2公共交流充電站充電，必須更換物理接口。接口外形、針腳數量及鎖定機構均不相同。根據AFIR，公共基礎設施不允許使用轉接頭。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — all new EU public AC charging points ≥22 kW must offer Type 2 (AFIR Art. 4)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.2 required for EV sold in China

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Non-compliant as-is. EVs exported from China to the EU must be fitted with an IEC 62196-2 Type 2 AC inlet to use public charging infrastructure. GB/T inlet is not accepted at EU public stations.
compliance_verdict.zh: 现状不符合要求。从中国出口欧盟的电动汽车必须配备IEC 62196-2 Type 2交流充电接口，方可使用欧盟公共充电设施。GB/T接口不被欧盟公共充电站接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: 現狀不符合要求。從中國出口歐盟的電動汽車必須配備IEC 62196-2 Type 2交流充電接口，方可使用歐盟公共充電設施。GB/T接口不被歐盟公共充電站接受。

requirement_topic.zh: 直流快充接口标准（CCS Combo 2）
requirement_topic.zht: 直流快充接口標準（CCS Combo 2）

summary.en: EU public DC fast-charging points must use IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 connectors. AFIR (Regulation (EU) 2023/1804) mandates CCS2 as the single DC standard for all new EU public charging infrastructure.
summary.zh: 欧盟公共直流快充桩须采用IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2接口。AFIR法规（欧盟法规2023/1804）规定CCS2为所有新建欧盟公共充电基础设施的唯一直流标准。
summary.zht: 歐盟公共直流快充樁須採用IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2接口。AFIR法規（歐盟法規2023/1804）規定CCS2為所有新建歐盟公共充電基礎設施的唯一直流標準。

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.3 for DC fast charging, defining a physically distinct 9-pin connector (CHAdeMO-influenced design) incompatible with CCS Combo 2. The pin layout, communication protocol (CAN vs. PLC), and inlet shape all differ.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3标准，定义了与CCS Combo 2物理上不兼容的9针接口（受CHAdeMO影响）。针脚布局、通信协议（CAN与PLC）及接口外形均不相同。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3標準，定義了與CCS Combo 2物理上不相容的9針接口（受CHAdeMO影響）。針腳佈局、通訊協定（CAN與PLC）及接口外形均不相同。

gap.en: Hardware connector is physically incompatible. Chinese EVs with a GB/T DC inlet cannot fast-charge at EU CCS2 stations. No adapter is permitted at EU public DC stations under AFIR. The vehicle's onboard charger communication stack (GB/T 27930 CAN vs. ISO 15118 PLC) also differs, compounding the incompatibility beyond just the physical plug.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容。搭载GB/T直流接口的中国电动汽车无法在欧盟CCS2快充站充电。根据AFIR，欧盟公共直流充电站不允许使用转接头。车载充电通信协议（GB/T 27930 CAN与ISO 15118 PLC）也不同，进一步加剧了不兼容性。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容。搭載GB/T直流接口的中國電動汽車無法在歐盟CCS2快充站充電。根據AFIR，歐盟公共直流充電站不允許使用轉接頭。車載充電通訊協定（GB/T 27930 CAN與ISO 15118 PLC）也不同，進一步加劇了不相容性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — all new EU public DC fast-charging points must offer CCS Combo 2 (AFIR Art. 4 & Annex II); CHAdeMO and other standards are no longer mandated
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.3 required for DC fast-charge EV sold in China

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Non-compliant as-is. EVs exported from China to the EU must be retrofitted with a CCS Combo 2 DC inlet (and compatible communication stack) to access EU public DC fast-charging. GB/T DC inlet is not accepted at EU public fast-charge stations.
compliance_verdict.zh: 现状不符合要求。从中国出口欧盟的电动汽车必须改装CCS Combo 2直流充电接口（及兼容通信协议栈），方可使用欧盟公共直流快充设施。GB/T直流接口不被欧盟公共快充站接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: 現狀不符合要求。從中國出口歐盟的電動汽車必須改裝CCS Combo 2直流充電接口（及相容通訊協定棧），方可使用歐盟公共直流快充設施。GB/T直流接口不被歐盟公共快充站接受。

requirement_topic.en: Legal Mandate: AFIR vs. AFID and Transition Timeline
requirement_topic.zh: 法律依据：AFIR与AFID及过渡时间表
requirement_topic.zht: 法律依據：AFIR與AFID及過渡時間表

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR) replaced Directive 2014/94/EU (AFID) with binding targets. AFIR entered into force 13 April 2024. New public charging pools must comply from that date; all existing pools must be upgraded to Type 2 / CCS2 by 2025–2026 depending on power level. AFIR is directly applicable in all EU member states without transposition.
summary.zh: 欧盟法规2023/1804（AFIR）以具有约束力的目标取代了2014/94/EU指令（AFID）。AFIR于2024年4月13日生效。新建公共充电站须自该日期起符合要求；现有充电站须于2025-2026年（依功率等级而定）完成升级，配备Type 2/CCS2接口。AFIR在所有欧盟成员国直接适用，无需转化立法。
summary.zht: 歐盟法規2023/1804（AFIR）以具有約束力的目標取代了2014/94/EU指令（AFID）。AFIR於2024年4月13日生效。新建公共充電站須自該日期起符合要求；現有充電站須於2025-2026年（依功率等級而定）完成升級，配備Type 2/CCS2接口。AFIR在所有歐盟成員國直接適用，無需轉化立法。

summary.en: China's equivalent policy mandate is GB/T 20234 series (enforced via MIIT type-approval). No bilateral connector recognition or mutual acceptance agreement exists between China GB/T and EU IEC 62196 standards. [UNVERIFIED: No formal mutual recognition treaty confirmed as of accessed date.]
summary.zh: 中国对应的政策强制要求为GB/T 20234系列（通过工信部型式认证执行）。中国GB/T标准与欧盟IEC 62196标准之间不存在双边接口互认或相互接受协议。[未经核实：截至访问日期，未确认存在正式互认条约。]
summary.zht: 中國對應的政策強制要求為GB/T 20234系列（通過工信部型式認證執行）。中國GB/T標準與歐盟IEC 62196標準之間不存在雙邊接口互認或相互接受協議。[未經核實：截至訪問日期，未確認存在正式互認條約。]

gap.en: No harmonisation or mutual recognition between GB/T and IEC 62196 series. AFIR is a binding EU Regulation (not a Directive), meaning no member-state flexibility to accept GB/T connectors. Any EV destined for the EU market must carry Type 2 (AC) and CCS Combo 2 (DC) inlets as a hard market-entry requirement.
gap.zh: GB/T与IEC 62196系列之间不存在协调或互认机制。AFIR是具有约束力的欧盟法规（而非指令），成员国无权自行接受GB/T接口。任何面向欧盟市场的电动汽车，必须配备Type 2（交流）和CCS Combo 2（直流）充电接口，这是进入市场的硬性要求。
gap.zht: GB/T與IEC 62196系列之間不存在協調或互認機制。AFIR是具有約束力的歐盟法規（而非指令），成員國無權自行接受GB/T接口。任何面向歐盟市場的電動汽車，必須配備Type 2（交流）和CCS Combo 2（直流）充電接口，這是進入市場的硬性要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory and directly applicable across all 27 EU member states from 13 April 2024 (AFIR)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestically; no reciprocal obligation on EU side to accept GB/T

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Non-compliant as-is. AFIR creates a hard legal requirement with no national opt-out. Chinese-standard connectors are not legally permitted at EU public charging infrastructure. Market entry requires physical hardware change to Type 2 / CCS2 — this is a product redesign item, not a documentation gap.
compliance_verdict.zh: 现状不符合要求。AFIR确立了无成员国豁免选项的硬性法律要求。中国标准接口在欧盟公共充电基础设施中不具备合法地位。进入欧盟市场须将接口硬件更换为Type 2/CCS2——这是产品重新设计项目，而非文件缺失问题。
compliance_verdict.zht: 現狀不符合要求。AFIR確立了無成員國豁免選項的硬性法律要求。中國標準接口在歐盟公共充電基礎設施中不具備合法地位。進入歐盟市場須將接口硬件更換為Type 2/CCS2——這是產品重新設計項目，而非文件缺失問題。
